<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [ConoHa v2](https://www.conoha.jp/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/conoha/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "conoha"
  dnsCredentials:
    # CONOHA_API_PASSWORD: The API password
    apiPassword: ""
    # CONOHA_API_USERNAME: The API username
    apiUsername: ""
    # CONOHA_TENANT_ID: Tenant ID
    tenantID: ""
    # CONOHA_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # CONOHA_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # CONOHA_REGION: The region (Default: tyo1)
    region: ""
    # CONOHA_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 60)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
